name: set_reminder
description: Sets a one-time or recurring reminder for the user, delivered via the specified notification channel.

message.description: The reminder message or note to deliver to the user.

remind_at.description: The exact date and time to trigger the reminder in ISO 8601 format.

recurrence.description: How often the reminder repeats. Defaults to 'none' (one-time).

channel.description: Delivery channel for the reminder. Defaults to 'push'.
